_comment: Drawer / open demo objects. Run with `--scene chemistry_drawer` so the DEFAULT LabUtopia task is openclose (level1_open_drawer): the cabinet is the task's own object, placed + visible from frame 0. Cabinet_01 is `fixed` furniture (not rebound into a pick task, not teleported by show_all_objects); the adapter pins its obj_paths range to the declared pose so it sits still, then the startup task.reset() makes it co-present. Try: `open the drawer`.
